title: Title Remover
description: A very very simple resource pack that should (key word, should, may not work with some mods) remove the title, or in other words, the word Minecraft in the start menu.
body:
A very very simple resource pack that should (keyword, should, may not work with some mods) remove the title, or in other words, the word Minecraft in the start menu.
It's a "no logo" or "no title" style mod!

[From original curseforge page]:

Splash-text don't like me (but at least they don't hate me) :(

Seems to work on newer versions, try it on older versions to check if it really works!

(Original Post: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/title-screen-remover )
